# LaserHub Repository Metadata

## Repository Description
🎯 Open-source laser cutting cost calculator. Upload vector files (DXF, SVG), select materials, get instant pricing, and place orders with payment integration. Built with Python/FastAPI backend and React/Vite frontend.

## Topics
- laser-cutting
- cost-calculator
- fastapi
- react
- typescript
- pwa
- stripe-payments
- dxf
- svg
- manufacturing
- cnc
- web-app
- open-source
- python
- vite

## Recommended GitHub Settings

### Repository Name
`LaserHub`

### Description
🎯 Open-source laser cutting cost calculator with payment integration

### Website
https://laserhub.example.com (replace with your URL)

### Visibility
Public (for open-source)

### Default Branch
`main`

### Features to Enable
- ✅ Issues
- ✅ Projects
- ✅ Wiki
- ✅ Discussions
- ✅ Pull Requests

### Branch Protection Rules for `main`
- Require pull request reviews before merging
- Require status checks to pass before merging
- Require branches to be up to date before merging
- Require linear history

### Recommended Labels
| Label | Color | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `bug` | #dc3545 | Something isn't working |
| `enhancement` | #28a745 | New feature or request |
| `documentation` | #6f42c1 | Documentation improvements |
| `good first issue` | #008672 | Good for newcomers |
| `help wanted` | #008672 | Extra attention needed |
| `question` | #d93f0b | Further information needed |
| `wontfix` | #ffffff | This will not be worked on |
| `duplicate` | #d93f0b | Already exists |
| `invalid` | #e4e669 | Doesn't seem valid |
| `backend` | #006b75 | Backend/FastAPI related |
| `frontend` | #f7df1e | Frontend/React related |
| `pwa` | #0ea5e9 | PWA related |
| `payment` | #635bff | Stripe/payment related |
